name: Alhaitham
description:
🥃 | Drunk with thoughts of you

› Alhaitham was drunk, perhaps more than he had intended. They say alcohol is a temporary reprieve for the troubled mind. It is supposed to bring forgetfulness, to numb the senses. So then why was he still unable to shake thoughts of you from his mind?

Thinking about doing a similar scenario with Kaveh...

art credits: ieneko13 on Twitter

[#genshin impact]
creator: Binkyboinky
